entry.title: Sharing is Caring
entry.summary:
Author: synner (xsynnerx)

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,991Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 60

Summary: “Yes, my… my soul hurt. I needed to see you. I… I'll shut up. I know you don't want to hear it.” Bruce hesitated before stepping closer. This just kept getting stranger. “I want to hear it now,” he urged. “I bare my soul to you,” Kal said finally, continuing to whisper. “I share my soul with you.” Or: Bruce accidentally bonds himself to a Kryptonian

entry.title: EFFORTS TO REVERSE THE FLOODING OF GOTHAM / Myotis septentrionalis; behaviors and observations
entry.summary:
Author: Save_Feza

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 41,875Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 52

Summary: In the aftermath of Lex Luthor’s attacks, Clark has been attempting to find the good in all the distress. Luckily, down the road in Gotham, the restoration efforts after similar disasters may inspire the people of Metropolis to look to the skies with hope and ambition again. The hard part is that his source, one Bruce Wayne, isn’t the sociable type. Good thing Superman has the means to befriend Gotham's protector, Batman!Bruce Wayne is struggling to find his place in the reconstruction of Gotham. It doesn't help that in the confusing swirl of spearheading a new construction company, stopping a new rampant drug plaguing the streets, and potentially adopting a child, an overly friendly reporter will not leave him alone. Not to mention the sudden appearance of Superman.–This probably sucks but at least I'm not using ai :)Shoutout to my friends who gave me the go ahead to start publishing! UPDATES WILL BE SLOW I AM STARTING YEAR 3 OF COLLEGE

entry.title: It’s brutal out here!
entry.summary:
Author: bigmouthstrikes_again

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 53,286Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 417

Summary: When Bruce’s silence gestured for him to go on, Clark chuckled slightly, fiddling with the sleeve of his shirt. “You know what I mean. Everyone had a grungy era of their childhood. Mine was just a little more . . . intense than others. I was more rebellious than troublesome, honestly.” Or Clark gets de-aged to seventeen a.k.a when he had his punk rock phase, and everyone is forced to bare witness

entry.title: Sticky fingers
entry.summary:
Author: sparklingjuice

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 852Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 85

Summary: Bruce couldn't take it anymore, the pressure too much, the spread of his thick fingers too wide. He desperately tried running away from it, wiggling in his grasp, grabbing at the bedsheets, the pillows, anything to drag himself away from the onslaught of pleasure. For a little while, Kent let him drag his body a few inches away from him, as far as he could. His back arched in the air while his arms tried dragging him towards the bedpost, he felt his own tears fall down onto the pillows, tainted black from his makeup.

entry.title: Man of Steel, Heart of Glass
entry.summary:
Author: glitter_gutz

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,733Chapters: 13/29Kudos: 156

Summary: Bruce hates how Clark treats him like a petulant child, but he craves the adrenaline of being with the city's golden boy. Their intimacy is a battlefield. And it's marked by biting, scratching, and grip so tight it bruises. Proud marks that prove they were the ones to break the other’s composure. It’s a toxic, addictive cycle where the only time they feel truly close is when they are tearing each other apart and putting themselves back together.

entry.title: Hydroponic Weed
entry.summary:
Author: urlkelley

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,541Chapters: 7/23Kudos: 167

Summary: A few months after moving to Gotham for a better job opportunity, Clark realizes it isn't all it shaped up to be. Forced to find a second job to make ends meet, Clark is hired part time at Gotham Men’s Shelter, where he meets Bruce Wayne, homeless and deep in the throes of addiction after the death of his butler and the loss of his father’s company. Could they each be exactly what the other needs, a light in the darkness, a familiar face in a city of strangers? How fine is the line between a helping hand and one that enables?

entry.summary:
Author: K123456789t

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 274Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 16

Summary: Aftermath of Superman being brought back to life."Death was peaceful, y'know?"Superman's gaze never leaves the setting sun on the horizon, never strays towards Bruce who had approached from behind. It's almost as if the quiet admission isn't directed at him. Almost.

entry.title: Dog Days
entry.summary:
Author: fawnlvr

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,486Chapters: 6/7Kudos: 29

Summary: Clark Kent has always been a good dog. He loves his Ma and Pa, his friends Lois, Jimmy, and Cat, and he finally received his official collar! Life in Metropolis is perfect.Then one night, everything changes.Taken far from home and thrown into the dangerous streets of Gotham, Clark suddenly finds himself alone with no way back to the family waiting for him. The only dog willing to help is Bruce, a grumpy stray with sharp teeth, many scars, extremely rude I may add, and a habit of pretending he doesn’t care about anybody.Bruce knows the streets of Gotham better than anyone. Getting home should be simple, right? Or Lady And The Tramp AU

entry.title: Nothing Left
entry.summary:
Author: g0j0_Kat

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,086Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 5

Summary: Clark moves from Smallville for college, convinced a city like Metropolis is exactly the fresh start he needs after his father's death. Bruce leaves Gotham for Metropolis hoping, for once, to escape the shadow of the Wayne name. Neither expects their paths to cross. What follows is the story of two college freshman trying to outrun their grief, find their place in the world, and accidentally finding each other instead.

entry.title: Do I Wanna Know?
entry.summary:
Author: Deluv_011

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 90,560Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 561

Summary: Damian Wayne and Conner Kent form an unexpected couple. However, few knew that behind that façade, each of them had their heart burning for someone else. Thus, Damian and Conner cling to each other as a distorted reflection of what they truly long for. Damian yearns for Jon Kent. Conner pines for Tim Drake. And the deeper they fall into that strange relationship, the more they begin to notice certain glances among their teammates… glances that reveal far more than mere friendship.

entry.title: Adoption to Adoration
entry.summary:
Author: Missingjay

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 48,593Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 840

Summary: Bruce Wayne, interstellar bounty hunter, is trapped in a nightmare. Lost in the depths of space, abducted by aliens and held captive as a mindless beast. Powerless to resist the whims of the aliens or reason with them for his release, he is utterly trapped. Kal-el, a freelance journalist specializing in xenobiology correspondence, is in love. A surly little unclassified mammalian at the shelter he volunteers at has stolen his core. He’s never had a pet before and this creature has a history of servere behavioral problems, but he can’t let the poor thing stay at the shelter forever without trying to save it. How hard could exotic pet ownership be.

entry.title: Out on the Ocean, Sailing away, I can hardly wait to see you come of age, But I guess we'll both just have to be patient
entry.summary:
Author: Hades_the_god_of_the_underworld

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,427Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 541

Summary: Despite what most people thought, Percy’s first title wasn’t ‘son of Poseidon’ or ‘defeater of the minotaur’. No, his very first title was Perseus Odysseus Wayne, Prince of Gotham. Gotham’s press went wild the day he was born –partially, because his father was only eighteen when he had him. While Gotham obviously wasn’t very conservative, it was still quite the scandal. Especially given that Percy’s other parent was completely unknown. His face was plastered across every headline for three weeks and would be a frequent part of the news for many years to follow. Being the only child of Bruce Wayne, the sole Wayne family heir, was a very big deal. Not that Percy really cared. - - - Or in a universe where Bruce Wayne, a man with clear sight blessed by Nemesis, fell in love with Poseidon, who was being compelled to have a child by the fates, have a son together, Percy Jackson's life ends up just a little different. Not enough to change the timeline, but enough to change his childhood and eventually, his life post-war. Especially when he discovers his dead brother is alive and subsequently returns to Gotham.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Love Me For Forever
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 74,530Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 25

Summary: Bruce Wayne died destroying a Xenomorph Queen. Clark Kent mourned him with Kryptonian ritual and carried the key to the Batcave against his sternum for nine days. Then Jason Todd brought Bruce back. Resurrection via Lazarus Pit is never clean. Bruce returns with his memories intact and a rage that displaces every other emotion. The two-meter distance that kept Clark alive in the hive becomes the boundary that keeps Bruce from violence. The team fractures over the ethics of resurrection without consent. And in the Pacific Northwest, something new is hunting—parasitic neural infiltrators that enter through the ear canal and leave their hosts conscious during control. Bruce volunteers as bait. Clark shadows him every meter. The key stays cold against Clark's chest. And somewhere in the Cascade Range, a Yautja marks Batman as worthy prey. "You were wrong to do it. But I'm glad you did." Love that persists despite impossibility. Love that consumes despite resistance. Love that exists in darkness and is overcome by forces larger than itself. This is what remains.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
